class="n">framework_name</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">framework_name</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="n">results</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">api</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">query</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">limit</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">100</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="n">hosts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">results</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"matches"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]):</span> <span class="n">hosts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span> <span class="s2">"ip"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"ip_str"</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="s2">"port"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"port"</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="s2">"org"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"org"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"country"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"location"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{})</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"country_name"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"asn"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"asn"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"timestamp"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"timestamp"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="p">})</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">hosts</span> </code></pre></div> <h3 id="step-2-passive-dns-pivoting">Step 2: Passive DNS Pivoting</h3> <div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><code><span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">requests</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">passive_dns_lookup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">indicator</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">api_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">indicator_type</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">"ip"</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="w"> </span><span class="sd">"""Query SecurityTrails for passive DNS records."""</span> <span class="n">base_url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.securitytrails.com/v1"</span> <span class="n">headers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">"APIKEY"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">api_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"Accept"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">"application/json"</span><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">indicator_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">"ip"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_url</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/search/list"</span> <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="s2">"filter"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">"ipv4"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">indicator</span><span class="p">}</span> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="n">resp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requests</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">post</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">headers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">headers</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_url</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/domain/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">indicator</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/subdomains"</span> <span class="n">resp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requests</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">headers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">headers</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status_code</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">200</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">query_passive_total</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">indicator</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">user</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">api_key</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="w"> </span><span class="sd">"""Query PassiveTotal for passive DNS and WHOIS data."""</span> <span class="n">base_url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.passivetotal.org/v2"</span> <span class="n">auth</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">user</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">api_key</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="c1"># Passive DNS</span> <span class="n">pdns_resp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requests</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_url</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/dns/passive"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">params</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">"query"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">indicator</span><span class="p">},</span> <span class="n">auth</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">auth</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">)</span> <span class="c1"># WHOIS</span> <span class="n">whois_resp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requests</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_url</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/whois"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">params</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">"query"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">indicator</span><span class="p">},</span> <span class="n">auth</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">auth</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">)</span> <span class="n">results</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pdns_resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status_code</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">200</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">results</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"passive_dns"</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pdns_resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"results"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">whois_resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status_code</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">200</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">results</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"whois"</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">whois_resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">results</span> </code></pre></div> <h3 id="step-3-certificate-transparency-monitoring">Step 3: Certificate Transparency Monitoring</h3> <div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><code><span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">requests</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">search_ct_logs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">domain</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="w"> </span><span class="sd">"""Search Certificate Transparency logs via crt.sh."""</span> <span class="n">resp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requests</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"https://crt.sh/?q=%.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">domain</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&output=json"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status_code</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">200</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">certs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="n">unique_domains</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="n">cert_info</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">cert</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">certs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">name_value</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"name_value"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">name_value</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="n">unique_domains</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="n">cert_info</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span> <span class="s2">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"id"</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"issuer"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"issuer_name"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"common_name"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"common_name"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"name_value"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">name_value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"not_before"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"not_before"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"not_after"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"not_after"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"serial_number"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"serial_number"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="p">})</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="s2">"domain"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">domain</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"total_certificates"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">certs</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"unique_domains"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">unique_domains</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"certificates"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert_info</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">monitor_new_certs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">domains</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">interval_hours</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="w"> </span><span class="sd">"""Monitor for newly issued certificates for a list of domains."""</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">datetime</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">datetime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timedelta</span> <span class="n">cutoff</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">datetime</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">utcnow</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">timedelta</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hours</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">interval_hours</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isoformat</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="n">new_certs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">domain</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">domains</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">search_ct_logs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">domain</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">cert</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"certificates"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]):</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"not_before"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">></span> <span class="n">cutoff</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">new_certs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span> <span class="s2">"domain"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">domain</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"cert"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">})</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">new_certs</span> </code></pre></div> <h3 id="step-4-infrastructure-correlation-and-timeline">Step 4: Infrastructure Correlation and Timeline</h3> <div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><code><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">datetime</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">datetime</span> <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_infrastructure_timeline</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">indicators</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="w"> </span><span class="sd">"""Build a timeline of infrastructure changes."""</span> <span class="n">timeline</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ind</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">indicators</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">"passive_dns"</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ind</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"passive_dns"</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="n">timeline</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span> <span class="s2">"timestamp"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"firstSeen"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"event"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">"dns_resolution"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"source"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"resolve"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"target"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"value"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"record_type"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"recordType"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="p">})</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">"certificates"</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">cert</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ind</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"certificates"</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="n">timeline</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span> <span class="s2">"timestamp"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"not_before"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"event"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">"certificate_issued"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"domain"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"common_name"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="s2">"issuer"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">cert</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"issuer"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="p">})</span> <span class="n">timeline</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"timestamp"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">timeline</span> </code></pre></div> <h2 id="validation-criteria_1">Validation Criteria</h2> <ul> <li>Shodan/Censys queries return infrastructure details for target IPs</li> <li>Passive DNS reveals historical domain-IP mappings</li> <li>Certificate transparency search finds associated domains</li> <li>Infrastructure pivoting discovers new related indicators</li> <li>Timeline shows infrastructure evolution over time</li> <li>Results are exportable as STIX 2.1 Infrastructure objects</li> </ul> <h2 id="references_7">References</h2> <ul> <li><a href="https://developer.shodan.io/api">Shodan API Documentation</a></li> <li><a href="https://search.censys.io/api">Censys Search API</a></li> <li><a href="https://securitytrails.com/corp/api">SecurityTrails API</a></li> <li><a href="https://crt.sh/">crt.sh Certificate Transparency</a></li> <li><a href="https://api.passivetotal.org/api/docs/">PassiveTotal API</a></li> <li><a href="https://github.com/salesforce/jarm">JARM Fingerprinting</a></li> </ul> <p>2026 Galyarder Labs.
